name: Chelsea VAR Drama

article.title: Chelsea's Stunning VAR Decision Sparks Outrage
article.description: Match officials reviewed the incident for 4 minutes before awarding the goal, triggering widespread debate among fans and pundits.

reactions.author: FootballFanatic_UK
reactions.text: Absolute robbery! VAR has killed the joy of football. This is why we can't have nice things.

reactions.author: PremierLeagueFan
reactions.text: I've seen this happen 3 times this season. The rules need to change NOW.

reactions.author: CoachMike
reactions.text: From a tactical standpoint, the defensive setup was correct. The officiating was not.

reactions.author: SoccerStatsDaily
reactions.text: This is the 4th controversial VAR call this week. The system is broken.

source.title: Chelsea vs Arsenal: The VAR Incident That Divided Football
source.author: James Ducker

speakerNotes: Let's talk about what happened in that crucial match...
The VAR decision took 4 minutes - that's unprecedented
Look at the social media reaction - over 3.8M views
Fan sentiment is overwhelmingly negative here
What do you think - was the call correct?
